title: pyrus magdalena
intro: Pyrus magdalena, also known as the Magdalena pear tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus magdalena include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and aid in digestion. The herbal preparations of Pyrus magdalena include tea, tincture, and infusion, which can be made by steeping the leaves and branches in hot water.
